emails.subject: Option Trades Today
emails.body: Option Trades Today For your account, sold $22.30 Cal 02 straddles: 50,000/month $5.21 J.Aron 25/month $5.17 J.Aron 25/month $5.17 Bank of America 25/month $5.15 BofA 50/month $5.12 BofA For my account, I bought back an in-the-money producer collar from a LaGrasta customer for total premium of approx. $1.25MM.

emails.subject: RE: Option Trades Today
emails.body: RE: Option Trades Today I'm sorry, could you also figure out and include premium owed to me To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: Option Trades Today
emails.body: Total premium to you is $10.845MM (less Brokerage). My deal below was just re-jiggered for premium outflow of $1.16MM. To: White, Bill
